task: Fix Turn.ts integration issues found in Phase 36a verification
description: Fixed compilation errors in Turn.ts by updating references to work with cleaned up HistoryService API

changes.description: Fixed HistoryState.TOOLS_EXECUTING reference to use HistoryState.TRANSACTION_ACTIVE
Fixed commitTransaction() method call to remove transactionId parameter
Fixed rollbackTransaction() method call to pass reason string instead of transactionId
Fixed addToolResponseToTransaction() calls to properly create ToolResponse objects
Fixed addAssistantMessageToTransaction() call to remove transactionId parameter

verification.compilation: Turn.ts now compiles successfully without errors
verification.integration: All HistoryService method calls now match the correct API signatures

issues_fixed: HistoryState.TOOLS_EXECUTING does not exist - changed to TRANSACTION_ACTIVE
Method signature mismatches for transaction methods - corrected all parameters
ToolResponse type violations - created proper ToolResponse objects
Unused import warnings - resolved by explicit type usage
